reference.title: BMS step options
reference.abstract: Use the BMS Step Options to edit the ASMMAP step of the ELAXFBMS JCL procedure that is included with the product.Before you start, verify that the ELAXFBMS procedure is customized for your site. For more information about customizing the ELAXF* JCL procedures, see ELAXF* remote build procedures.

refbody.section: PurposeThe options that you specify on this window are used to generate JCL for the selected procedure.

section.title: Fields
section.p: BMS Map Object Library: The location where the generated physical map object is placed.
BMS DSECT Step Name: The name of the step for assembling macros to produce the symbolic map.
BMS DSCTLIB Library: The location where the symbolic map is placed.
section.note: For fields that take partitioned data sets as their value, you can drag a partitioned data set name from the Remote Systems view, z/OS Projects view, or Remote z/OS Search results view and drop it in the field. To change the order of partitioned data set names in a field, place the cursor in the field and click Change Order from the menu.
